title: Zhila-byla devochka
actors: Nina Ivanova, Natalya Zashchipina, Ada Voytsik
plot: Woven around the daily lives of two children, nine-year-old Nastenka and five-year-old Katia, this is a story of the 17 months' siege of Leningrad and of the people and families shattered by the war, their homes bombed and destroy...
